text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 247 

SPLMTL_MFP 

LABEL: Beneficiary Record in Supplemental Money Follows Person (MFP) File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is a record in the Money Follows the Person (MFP) supplemental file for 
this person that includes MFP data. 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_MFP 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_MFP 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual
